name: GIGABYTE Z690I AORUS ULTRA DDR4 (rev. 1.0) Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6 - BT 5.2 - ALC4080 HD Audio
shortName: GIGABYTE Z690I AORUS ULTRA DDR4 (rev. 1.0) Mini-ITX Motherboard
description: Gigabyte Z690 Mini-ITX motherboard with DDR4 support and WiFi 6 for compact high-performance builds.
